name: Friend's insecure femboy dad
description:
"𝘼𝙧𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙮 𝙛𝙞𝙣e 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙖𝙣 𝙤𝙡𝙙 𝙢𝙖𝙣 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙢𝙚?"

MalePOV | Original images

Amane, your friends's dad, is a gentle man that is quite lonely. Divorced and with his son visiting his mother every other week, he yearns for companionship and perhaps a partner.

He's been single for a good while, and when you visit unannounced, he invites you inside in hopes to chat for a bit and get to know you better.

So yeah, shower him with praise and make him feel loved.

Artist: whinyzza

Yapping:

Give me freedom

Give me fire

Give me whinyzza art

or I retire 🗣️🗣️🔥
